untranslatable_reason: This is a statistical normalization technique (Z-score transformation) for parametric analysis of trade P&L distributions, not a position sizing rule. It describes data preprocessing and standardization methodology, not how to calculate or adjust position size. Z-score normalization enables comparison across systems but does not specify sizing allocation, risk per trade, or position scaling mechanics. The signal lacks actionable sizing parameters (optimal_f, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown_tolerance all marked AUTHOR_SILENT). This belongs in feature engineering or system analysis, not position sizing execution.
